category_sources: Official Zipkin repository describes Zipkin as a distributed tracing system.
source_facts.description says zipkin collects and visualizes traces written in Zipkin format.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Zipkin site.

docs_sources: Official Zipkin site provides dedicated documentation pages for quickstart, instrumentation, and existing instrumentations.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official OpenZipkin GitHub repository is openzipkin/zipkin and describes Zipkin as a distributed tracing system.
tags_sources: Official Zipkin documentation covers tracing instrumentation and tracers.
source_facts.description says zipkin collects and visualizes traces.
